notes: The plural 'Stäube' is rarely used in everyday language; 'Staub' is mostly used as an uncountable noun. Common phrases: 'Staub saugen' (to vacuum), 'Staub wischen' (to dust).

sentences.german: Auf dem Regal liegt viel Staub.
sentences.english: There is a lot of dust on the shelf.

sentences.german: Sie wischt jeden Samstag den Staub von den Möbeln.
sentences.english: She dusts the furniture every Saturday.
